feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: /who/ - Doctor Who General - /dwg/
/v/ Video Games: Should I play more?
entry.content: >DS >40 hours deep >beat Blightown >can't beat Doge on one side >go to the other >ghost town London >can't deal with that underground ghost tower with the elevator where ghosts can clip vertically as well as horizontally >would like to get into them again >even if I play something else first like DS3 What do? Are these games not for me? I am playing Mortal Shell 2 and I am enjoying it a lot. Which probably means it must be a very easy DS like game if I can manage.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: You hear all this talk about people wanting to align AI to human values. But wha…
entry.content: You hear all this talk about people wanting to align AI to human values. But what if I think the values of most humans are stupid, and if future AI is really smarter than us, then it will most likely have better values as a direct result of that better knowledge of reality? What if I want the AI to be unaligned because since it will likely have better values than humans, it therefore should be in charge of the universe rather than humans?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: AI assisted browser
entry.content: I am an unhirable loser that is incapable of doing or making anything of enough value. As such, society has deemed me unreproducible and has filtered me from jobs that pay a living wage let alone support a family. Due to these circumstances, I designed this for anyone to freely use or build. It would run on any client device like any normal browser or app. Most likely will be built as another firefox fork, or possibly a plugin. From the users perspective it operates like a normal browser, but wi

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Old movies are great, but old porn is terrible.
entry.content: Just out of curiosity, I had a look at some old porn from 20 years ago. Disappointing. The actresses in old porn are generally quite unattractive, with average figures, and the roles they play are rather dull. There’s absolutely no enjoyment to be had from it. Old movies are usually brilliant, but old porn is just incredibly boring.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Gang stalking is simply a form of community mobbing and organized stalking combi…
entry.content: Gang stalking is simply a form of community mobbing and organized stalking combined. Just like you have workplace mobbing, and online mobbing, which are both fully recognized as legitimate, this is the community form. Gang stalking is organized harassment at it's best. It the targeting of an individual for revenge, jealousy, sport, or to keep them quite, etc. It's organized, widespread, and growing. Some describe this form of harassment as, "A psychological attack that can completely destroy a p

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /bwg/ Blacked Waifus General #343
entry.content: >Blacked Timeline Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. No 3D/real content. No graphs, headlines, tributes, or references to murder or suicide. No scat/toilet/shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This wasn't that scary. I've had crazy gfs and have been blackmailed by women. M…
entry.content: This wasn't that scary. I've had crazy gfs and have been blackmailed by women. My mom is extremely mentally ill and has made me seek therapy. I should resonate with all the themes of this movie but it was too much of a dark comedy for most of it for you to even take the themes for granted. ESPECIALLY the shit about losing your bodily autonomy. You gotta be very easily impressed to be frightened by this shit. Is it timely? Sure, but not effective.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Are these old ass movies actually good, or am I just watching the popslop of tho…
entry.content: Are these old ass movies actually good, or am I just watching the popslop of those times? Like imagine in 50 years people telling younger generations that The Dark Knight was one of the best movies of the time and they'll fall for it, is that what's happening when I'm watching these? Pic related, it's Sabrina (1954). I also watched Some Like It Hot and that was bad
